title: Mellow Chinese Beef Zha Jiang Mian
description: A silky, tangy noodle dish with cumin flavored beef sauce, perfect for festive gatherings.
instructions: Heat sesame oil in a wok over medium heat until shimmering.
Add minced garlic and ginger, sauté until fragrant about 30 seconds.
Push aromatics to the side and add beef slices, stir‑fry until browned, then remove from wok.
Deglaze the wok with 1 cup water, scraping up browned bits, then add soy sauce, oyster sauce, sugar, and cumin; simmer until the sauce thickens.
Return the beef to the wok, toss to coat, and cook for another minute.
Meanwhile, boil the noodles in salted water until al dente, then drain and rinse under cold water.
Divide the cooked noodles into bowls and ladle the beef sauce over them.
Sprinkle minced scallion and drizzle chili oil if using, then serve immediately.
Garnish with extra scallion or toasted sesame seeds if desired.
